extractive_summary.text:
We present DrQ-v2, a model-free reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm for visual continuous control. [Yarats et al., 2021b, Laskin et al., 2020] to solve hard visual control problems. Compared to previous state-of-the-art model-free methods, DrQ-v2 provides signiﬁcant
improvements in sample efﬁciency across tasks from the DeepMind Control Suite We have introduced a conceptually simple model-free actor-critic RL algorithm for image-based
continuous control – DrQ-v2. In
the context of visual control settings, clever use of augmented data [Yarats et al., 2021b, Laskin et al.,
2020] currently produces state-of-the-art results on visual tasks from DMC

Compared to previous state-of-the-art model-free methods, DrQ-v2 provides signiﬁcant

In
